meta.title: Whale Land — An idea company for playful services
meta.description: Whale Land creates playful services that make the world more varied, useful, and happy.

common.externalNotice: You are entering an independent service site.
common.footerLine: Fun ideas, useful services, happier moments.

home.introTitle:
Playful ideas for a more
varied and happier world.
home.introBody:
Whale Land is an idea company that adds small sparks of fun to everyday life and travel.
We freely weave technology, stories, characters, and offline experiences
into services that make the world a little more diverse and happy.
home.serviceListTitle: Whale Land services you can meet now
home.serviceListBody: Each service is an independent project with its own world and purpose. New services can be added to this hub as Whale Land evolves.
home.contactTitle: We welcome proposals, partnerships, and questions.
home.contactBody: For service use, partnerships, production, or business inquiries, contact us below. You can copy the email address with one button.

korean-birth-type.title: Korean Birth Type
korean-birth-type.cardTitle: Test yourself through Korean-style saju reading.
korean-birth-type.summary: Do you really know yourself? Test yourself through Korean-style saju reading. You may discover hints about your real love and luck.
korean-birth-type.homeDescription: Test yourself through Korean-style saju reading. You may discover hints about your real love and luck.
korean-birth-type.heroTitle: Test yourself through Korean-style saju reading.
korean-birth-type.heroLead: Korean Birth Type turns saju into a playful self-understanding experience, not a heavy prediction.
korean-birth-type.visualCaption: A playful self-reading system inspired by Korean saju.
korean-birth-type.statementEyebrow: A DIFFERENT WAY TO READ YOURSELF
korean-birth-type.statementTitle: Lighter than a prophecy, deeper than a quiz.
korean-birth-type.statementBody: It starts from your birth date and time, but it does not define your future. It turns day pillars, five elements, relationships, and luck into cards that help you look at yourself in a new way.
korean-birth-type.featuresTitle: A card-based way to read yourself

features.title: Korean-style reading
features.body: Saju structures are translated into modern language and card experiences.

features.title: Hints on love and luck
features.body: Relationships, tendencies, and rhythms are shown in a light but memorable way.

features.title: Mobile saving
features.body: Read the result like cards, save what stays with you, and revisit it later.

steps.title: Enter birth data
steps.body: Add the basic information needed for the reading.

steps.title: Card reading
steps.body: The saju-based interpretation unfolds as cards.

steps.title: Check results
steps.body: Save memorable parts and return to them later.

korean-birth-type.closingBody: Even if you think you know yourself well, it may give you a new clue.

haedurio.title: Haedurio
haedurio.summary: Having trouble in Korea? Try Haedurio, the fixer service that helps with almost anything.
haedurio.homeDescription: Try Haedurio, the fixer service that helps with almost anything.
haedurio.heroTitle: Local help when your Korea trip gets stuck.
haedurio.heroLead: Haedurio helps travelers organize unexpected problems in Korea, from reservations and purchases to delivery and lost items, then find a practical next step.
haedurio.visualCaption: Local help for the moments that interrupt your trip.
haedurio.statementTitle: Shorten the trouble, keep the trip going.
haedurio.statementBody: In an unfamiliar language and place, even a small problem can stop the whole trip. Haedurio helps clarify the situation, check the local context, and choose the next action.
haedurio.featuresTitle: From problem explanation to next steps

features.title: Clarify the situation
features.body: Guides you to organize even complicated issues from the necessary details.

features.title: Check local context
features.body: Reviews possible choices based on Korea's reservation, purchase, and delivery environment.

features.title: Connect the next action
features.body: Goes beyond translation and helps you understand what to do next.

haedurio.processTitle: From the moment trouble appears until you return to your trip.

steps.title: Share the situation
steps.body: Send the key details about what happened.

steps.title: Check possible routes
steps.body: Review available methods and required steps in the local context.

steps.title: Move forward
steps.body: Follow the selected direction to the next step.

haedurio.closingTitle: Make trip problems short and memories long.
haedurio.closingBody: When you need help in Korea, tell Haedurio what happened.

covert.title: C.O.V.E.R.T
covert.summary: No more ordinary trips! It is the age of covert infiltration action tourism. Mission CLEAR with Beomi!
covert.homeDescription: It is the age of covert infiltration action tourism. Mission CLEAR with Beomi!
covert.heroTitle: A stamp tour that turns Seoul into a secret mission.
covert.heroLead: Beomi Stamp Tour is an experience-based travel project where you explore Seoul like a field operation and record stamps in a passport-style mission book.
covert.visualCaption: A field mission hidden inside an ordinary city trip.
covert.statementTitle: From checking tourist spots to clearing missions.
covert.statementBody: The trip does not end with seeing famous places. Open the mission book, visit operation zones, collect stamps and field notes, and the whole Seoul trip becomes a secret mission.
covert.featuresTitle: A secret operation in your hand

features.title: Passport-style mission book
features.body: A physical booklet with briefings, place information, and record pages.

features.title: Seoul operation zones
features.body: Explore tradition, shopping, food, night views, and neighborhoods as different missions.

features.title: Mission CLEAR
features.body: Collect stamps and records to complete your own Seoul operation.

covert.processTitle: Receive the briefing, move to the field, and leave records.

steps.title: Receive briefing
steps.body: Check operation zones and directives in the mission book.

steps.title: Field operation
steps.body: Move through the city, collecting stamps and your own notes.

covert.closingTitle: Seoul is already an operation zone.
covert.closingBody: The independent site for agent registration and final reports is being prepared.
